{{nihongo|'''Nakatsu Shrine'''|住吉神社 (静岡市葵区)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Suruga Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nakatsu Shrine'''|住吉神社 (静岡市葵区)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Suruga Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nakatsu Shrine'''|住吉神社 (静岡市葵区)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Suruga Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nakatsu Shrine'''|住吉神社 (静岡市葵区)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Suruga Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nakatsu Shrine'''|住吉神社 (静岡市葵区)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Suruga Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nakatsu Shrine'''|住吉神社 (静岡市葵区)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Suruga Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nakatsu Shrine'''|住吉神社 (静岡市葵区)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Suruga Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nakatsu Shrine'''|住吉神社 (静岡市葵区)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Suruga Province]].
